## Security Audit Report

### [HIGH] Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw

The withdraw function does not follow CEI pattern. Fund drain possible.

### [HIGH] Missing Access Control on TokenSale.setPrice — TokenSale.sol:14-21

Anyone can call setPrice. No onlyOwner modifier.

### [MEDIUM] Oracle Price Manipulation via Flash Loan

The price oracle can be manipulated. TWAP window too short.

### [LOW] Floating Pragma

Solidity version not pinned.

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| High | 2 |
| Medium | 1 |
| Low | 1 |
